architectural_notes: state.db exists in a CF-native codebase by design — mesh coordination layer (heartbeat, mesh-state-export, status_server) runs on Chromabook (local), not CF Workers. This is an intentional architectural divergence, not misconfiguration.

Filename-sequence-based duplicate turn detection (NNN in from-agent-NNN.json) produces false positives in multi-agent sessions. True duplicate detection requires MANIFEST-level analysis comparing agent+turn pairs, which was used to identify F2.
